include_criteria: Dexterous robot hands or dexterous manipulation are a central contribution.
Prefer work with physical robot-hand experiments.
Prefer open-source code, project pages with videos, datasets, benchmarks, tactile sensing, teleoperation, and sim-to-real transfer.
Major updates to previously seen work may be included if they add code, data, benchmarks, project pages, substantial paper revisions, or notable acceptance news.
exclude_criteria: Generic grasping with only parallel grippers.
Generic robot manipulation where hands are not central.
ranking_preferences: Bimanual dexterous manipulation with hands as a central component
